title: Peace Memorial Park
summary: A reflective park at the edge of Ground Zero featuring a memorial, museum buildings, and the remnant minaret of the Bato Mosque.

title: Aga Khan Museum
summary: University museum in MSU showcasing Meranaw and Islamic art, textiles, and cultural artifacts for deeper regional understanding.

title: Lake Lanao
summary: A vast, ancient lake that shapes local life; known for scenic viewpoints and the 'Sleeping Beauty' mountain silhouette.

title: Mindanao State University (MSU)
summary: Main campus with lush grounds and golf course offering panoramic views of Lake Lanao; a cultural and academic center.

title: Sarimanok Sports Stadium
summary: Scenic lakeside sports complex with facilities for multiple sports and a convention center nearby.

title: Mount Mupo
summary: A low mountain inside the Sacred Mountain National Park ideal for birdwatching, trekking, and nature observation.

title: Ground Zero
summary: The former siege center still bearing battle scars; an important but sobering historical site under controlled access.

title: Marawi Grand Mosque
summary: The rebuilt grand mosque and one of the largest in the Philippines, an architectural and spiritual landmark.

title: Dayawan Torogan
summary: A traditional Maranao noble house with distinctive 'panolong' carvings; currently in a fragile state with preserved ornaments.

title: Heaven Road
summary: A scenic elevated road transformed into a cafe strip with viewdecks offering misty, panoramic vistas over parts of the city.
